Day advanced to 2026-02-27.
10,163 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
127 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 11 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-02-28): ['13213', '172888', '354370', '468437', '59501', '599755', '635419', '768218', '70713', '80868', '917339']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

- "What airspace will the airline say must safely reopen before normal flights can fully resume by March 16, 2026?" → Qatari airspace

- "Which city will be reported as hearing multiple explosions during the strikes by February 28, 2026?" → Tehran
- "Which country will say by March 11, 2026 that it cannot participate in the 2026 FIFA World Cup?" → Iran
- "Which Iranian city will be reported as the site of an Israeli strike on an elementary girls' school that kills at least 51 people on February 28, 2026?" → Minab

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (203 resolved, 127 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
